subject: Growlithe, a small orange-and-black striped puppy-like creature in a field
description: A small, sturdy puppy-like creature with an orange body and black stripe markings stands alert in a rocky, earthy outdoor setting. The figure has a fluffy cream mane around its neck, a round expressive face, and a short stubby tail. The background suggests a rocky or rugged natural terrain rendered in warm earthy tones. This is a classic original-series illustration style with flat, clean linework. The palette is warm oranges, creams, and earthy browns.
foreground: small orange-and-black striped puppy-like creature with cream mane
background: rocky natural terrain in warm earthy tones
